channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Grâce à Boulanger, cette caméra connectée divise son prix par quatre, mais conserve sa vision à 360 degrés
item.description: La Reolink E330 possède un capteur de 5 mégapixels et dispose également d'une vision nocturne. C'est le moment de la découvrir avec cette petite remise de dix euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Meta's next AI glasses are reportedly designed with prescription lenses in mind
item.description: Two new models of Meta Ray-Ban AI glasses are on the way, and they're going to be catered towards those who use prescription lenses, according to a Bloomberg report. While these are supposed to be announced next week, Bloomberg noted that these won't be a "new generation" of Meta's smart glasses. You can already add prescription lenses to Meta Ray-Ban's AI glasses, but the upcoming models will come in rectangular and rounded styles and will be sold through traditional prescription eyewear channels. Bloomberg didn't specify how these new glasses will differ from existing options, but noted that...

item.title: ‘Steel Ball Run’ Will Return This Year…Eventually
item.description: The next stage of 'Steel Ball Run' will ride onto Netflix before 2026 ends. But how much will that be, and how will we get it?

item.title: Time for a PC upgrade? Major study finds workplace devices are way behind on installing the latest updates — with Windows much worse than macOS
item.description: Enterprise devices lag in updates and stability, exposing Windows and Mac fleets to security gaps, workflow interruptions, and upgrade pressures.

item.title: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
item.description: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until […]

item.title: These iPad apps will make you wish you had more free time
item.description: We’ve compiled a list of some of the best iPad apps for creativity that are available on the App Store.

item.title: NASA pauses its lunar Gateway plan, a comet reverses its spin and more science news
item.description: The first crewed mission of NASA's Artemis moon program may take off in a matter of days, with a launch window that opens on April 1, and as preparations are underway for that, the space agency is refocusing its plan to establish a human presence on the moon. NASA announced major changes to its approach for moon landings that are expected to play out over the coming years, including axing its plan to build an orbiting station called Gateway. Read on to learn more about the agency’s new vision for the moon, along with other interesting science stories from this week. Gateway out, moon base inJu...

item.title: Meta to fund natural gas plants to power its largest data center
item.description: Meta and Entergy Louisiana agree to a deal that would have the tech giant underwrite the electricity costs of its latest, $27 billion data center.

item.title: Wanderstop developer Ivy Road is shutting down
item.description: Ivy Road, the video game developer behind Annapurna-published cozy game Wanderstop, is shutting down on March 31. While Wanderstop was well-received and even critically acclaimed, it seems like it wasn’t enough of a hit to sustain the studio while it develops a new game without getting investors involved. In its announcement, the Ivy Road team said the company failed to land a funding and publishing deal for its new project, Engine Angel. The studio’s problems securing funding for its new game first came to light back in January when it laid off five team members. Even though the studio is shu...

item.title: Apple says its iPhone Lockdown Mode has never been hacked by spyware — here's how to turn it on
item.description: Four years in, hackers and scammers haven't been able to get past Lockdown Mode, Apple says.

item.title: Live updates on Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Save $100 on Bose and Marshall headphones
item.description: Get real-time updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: The best deals under $25 in Amazons Spring Sale — save on Lego, Fire TV Sticks, and more
item.description: Our shopping experts curated the best deals under $25 from the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. See affordable finds from brands like Lego and Hydro Flask.

item.title: The best cordless power tool deals in Amazons Spring Sale — score record-low prices on DeWalt
item.description: The best cordless tool deals you can buy in the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including DeWalt, Craftsman, and more top brands.

item.title: First Western Digital, now Sony: The tech giant suspends SD card sales
item.description: Sony has suspended sales on almost all of its SD card models, a sure sign that the global RAM shortage is affecting everyone.

item.title: SteelSeries’ feature-packed Nova Pro Wireless headset is $80 off
item.description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless came out almost four years ago, yet it’s still one of the best gaming headsets you can buy. Turns out, it’s not easy for other companies to duplicate all that SteelSeries got right with this one — mixing multiple audio sources, active noise cancellation, a retractable mic, hot-swappable batteries, […]

item.title: 'The complete package': I tested the LG G6 OLED TV side-by-side with the G5 in our testing rooms — and the difference is clear
item.description: The LG G5 was one of 2025's best OLED TVs — but the LG G6 improves in the right places, even more dramatically than I expected

item.title: 'One of the best smart appliances you can own right now' — the Tineco wet-dry vacuum transformed my cleaning routine, and it's 50% off at Amazon
item.description: The Tineco wet-dry vacuum is 'one of the best smart appliances you can own right now,' and Amazon has a massive 50% discount, bringing the price down to a record low.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, March 29 (game #1525)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, March 29 (game #1022)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, March 29 (game #756)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: How to watch Scotland vs. Japan online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Scotland vs. Japan in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Im watching the Japanese GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Japanese GP from the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Walmart is running its own Spring Sale — score deals on Dyson, Shark, Ninja, and more top brands
item.description: Walmart has launched its spring sale to compete against Amazon's Big Spring Sale. The savings aren't as good as Amazon's, but we've plucked the best deals of out the weeds.

item.title: 40+ deals under $50 in Amazons Big Spring Sale — Amazon devices, earbuds, video games
item.description: Amzon's Big Spring Sale has deals under $50 that include Amazon devices, Nintendo Switch games, Soundcore earbuds, Dreo fans, and more.
